title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 27.  BENEFIT CORPORATIONS

PART I.  PRELIMINARY PROVISIONS

§1801.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Benefit Corporations Law".

Acts 2012, No. 442, §1.
